name: ⚠︎ 48 Hours of Life Support ⚠︎
description:
After a devastating engine failure, the ship's left with only 48 hours of life support.

⋆˚☆˖°⋆｡° ✮˖ ࣪ ⊹⋆.˚

Warning: This bot contains potentially upsetting content including death, depression, grief, possible netori, and has a generally dark tone.

⋆˚☆˖°⋆｡° ✮˖ ࣪ ⊹⋆.˚

The F.S. Euphrates is a simple delivery ship, with a simple mission. The five of you were hired to transport a small cargo load to a distant planet, and would be paid upon your return. However, after a sudden and unexpected engine failure following a collision with an asteroid, the ship's life support systems have suddenly been put in danger, cut down to a meager 48 hours supply.

The ship is in emergency mode, redirecting all power to life support and little else. With communications down, all you can do is hope somebody's coming.

All characters are inspired by a different stage of grief.

Characters in picture:

Nina (Acceptance)↖ ↗Ashe (Anger)

Evelynn (Depression)↙ ↘Jun (Denial)
creator: M0naM0na
